data.title: Quarterhill Inc. to cut 100 jobs, 15% of its workforce, to lower costs and focus on key goals.
data.description: A Toronto-based company, Quarterhill Inc. (TSX: QTRH) (OTCQX: QTRHF), revealed plans to cut around 100 jobs, which accounts for roughly 15% of its workforce. The decision is part of a strategic move by the company to decrease costs and enhance efficiency.

data.title: DayBlink GPO and Folio partner to streamline procurement for luxury independent hotels, aiming to enhance operational efficiency.
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, DayBlink GPO, the leading buying consortium for upscale independent hotels, has forged a strategic alliance with Folio, a contemporary financial operations platform for the hospitality sector. This partnership aims to streamline procurement processes throughout hotels, with Folio designated as the primary marketplace for acquiring DayBlink GPO agreements. The collaboration seeks to provide smarter sourcing solutions to independent luxury hotels, bolstering operational efficiency.

data.title: Benchmark Electronics completes vital role in U.S. manufacturing and testing for Intel's Aurora Exascale Supercomputer at Argonne National Laboratory.
data.description: Benchmark Electronics, Inc. revealed the completion and approval of the Aurora exascale supercomputer installation at Argonne National Laboratory. This comes after a partnership with Intel to deliver manufacturing, test development, and test support for the project. As the first exascale computer at Argonne, Aurora is intended to cater mainly to the U.S. scientific sector and Department of Energy. Benchmark Electronics, Inc., a global company offering engineering, design, and manufacturing solutions, is listed on the NYSE as BHE.

data.title: Universal Electronics Inc. will host Q2 2025 financial results call on August 7th in Scottsdale, Arizona. #UEIC
data.description: Universal Electronics Inc., based in Scottsdale, Arizona, has announced that they will be hosting a conference call to discuss their financial results for the second quarter of 2025. The call is scheduled for August 7th and investors, analysts, and the general public are invited to participate. This event is significant as it will provide insights into the company's performance during this period and offer valuable information to stakeholders. Universal Electronics Inc. is a leading company in the industry, and the conference call is expected to shed light on key financial figures and strategic developments.

data.title: D-Wave Quantum to release Q2 2025 financials on August 7, 2025, for quarter ended June 30. Check IR site for details.
data.description: D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS), a prominent player in quantum computing solutions, is set to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, which concluded on June 30, 2025. The results will be made public on Thursday, August 7 before the market opens. Interested parties can access the press release via the D-Wave Investor Relations website at https://ir.dwavesys.com/. Additionally, D-Wave will conduct a conference call on the same day, August 7.

data.title: Garrett Motion's Q2 2025 financial results: net sales $913M, net income $87M, raised full-year outlook, EBIT margin 13.6%.
data.description: Garrett Motion Inc. reported strong financial results for the second quarter of 2025 with net sales of $913 million, a 3% increase compared to the same period in 2024. Net income was $87 million with a margin of 9.5%, and adjusted EBIT was $124 million with a margin of 13.6%. Adjusted free cash flow totaled $121 million, enabling share repurchases and dividends. The company raised its full-year 2025 outlook, reflecting favorable foreign currency impacts. Garrett achieved milestones in E-Powertrain, E-Cooling, and Fuel Cell programs, won awards, and launched an innovation center in Wuhan. Garrett's available liquidity as of June 30, 2025, was $862 million. The company revised its full-year 2025 outlook for net sales, net income, adjusted EBITDA, and adjusted free cash flow. Garrett is a leading automotive technology provider focused on turbocharging and zero-emission solutions with operations in over 20 countries. For more information, visit www.garrettmotion.com.

data.title: Intel 471 launched Guided Threat Hunts tool for threat hunting in HUNTER solution, to empower threat hunters with query capabilities.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, Intel 471, a leading provider of cyber intelligence solutions globally, introduced Guided Threat Hunts as part of the HUNTER solution. This new tool aims to simplify the process of threat hunting for advanced adversaries, recognizing the growing complexity and resource demands associated with this task. By enabling threat hunters to create their own filters and queries, Intel 471 seeks to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of threat identification.

data.title: Nasdaq declares quarterly dividend of $0.27 per share, payable on Sept 26, 2025 to shareholders of record on Sept 12, 2025.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Nasdaq, Inc. announced a regular quarterly dividend of $0.27 per share for its common stock (Nasdaq: NDAQ). Shareholders of record at the close of business on September 12, 2025, will receive the dividend on September 26, 2025. The approval of future quarterly dividends, as well as the determination of record and payment dates, is at the discretion of Nasdaq's Board of Directors.

data.title: Valley National Bancorp's Q2 2025 net income is $133.2 million, $0.22 per share, up from Q1 2025's $106.1 million, $0.18 per share. Adjusted net income is $134.4 million, $0.23 per share.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, Valley National Bancorp, the holding company for Valley National Bank, announced a net income of $133.2 million, equivalent to $0.22 per diluted common share. This represents an increase from the first quarter of 2025, where the net income was $106.1 million ($0.18 per diluted common share), and the second quarter of 2024, with a net income of $70.4 million ($0.13 per diluted common share). Excluding non-core income and charges, the adjusted net income for the second quarter of 2025 was $134.4 million ($0.23 per diluted common share), compared to $106.1 million ($0.18 per diluted common share) in the first quarter of 2025 and $71.6 million ($0.13 per diluted common share) in the second quarter of 2024. Further details, including a reconciliation of non-GAAP adjusted net income, can be found in the "Consolidated Financial Highlights" tables.

data.title: Nasdaq's Q2 2025 results show double-digit net revenue growth across all divisions, as per July 24 report. Moving strong.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Nasdaq, Inc. (Nasdaq: NDAQ) released its financial results for Q2 2025.
Company reveals Q2 2025 financial results.

data.title: MultiBank.io partners with Fireblocks to tokenize $10 billion in real estate assets, aiming to enhance investment opportunities securely and compliantly.
data.description: MultiBank Group, the leading financial derivatives institution globally, revealed that its digital asset division, MultiBank.io, will be leveraging Fireblocks for a groundbreaking real estate tokenization project. This platform aims to tokenize $10 billion worth of real-world assets, facilitating secure and compliant investment opportunities. The initial phase of this initiative stems from MultiBank.io’s significant partnership, valued at $3 billion, with MAG Lifes.

data.title: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. had a strong Q2 in 2025 with earnings per share up by 49% year-over-year.
data.description: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. has released its impressive performance for the second quarter of 2025. The company reported a substantial increase in earnings per share by 49% compared to the same period last year. This strong growth highlights the firm's financial strength and management's effective strategies. Investors will likely view this positive development as a sign of the company's solid performance and potential for future success.

data.title: Mobileye reports strong Q2 2025 performance, raises full-year outlook, revenue growth. CEO optimistic despite cautious stance.
data.description: Jerusalem-based Mobileye Global Inc. (Nasdaq: MBLY) has announced its financial results for Q2 ending on June 28, 2025. The company reported strong performance in revenue growth and cost management during this period. Due to improved visibility on industry supply-demand dynamics since late April, Mobileye has raised its full-year outlook. Despite this positive outlook, the company remains cautious due to broader macroeconomic factors. The President and CEO of Mobileye expressed satisfaction with the business's performance in the second quarter.

data.title: Crypto thefts exceed $3.1B in 2025 due to access issues, says Hacken. Weak access control is a major factor.
data.description: A report by Hacken reveals that in 2025, over $3.1 billion worth of cryptocurrency has been reported as lost. The main reason behind this significant loss is access-control exploits.

data.title: Visteon reports Q2 2025 results: Sales $969M, Net income $65M, Adjusted EBITDA $134M, Operating cash flow $165M. Dividend initiated.
data.description: In Van Buren Township, Michigan on July 24, 2025, Visteon Corporation (NASDAQ: VC) released their financial results for the second quarter. The key figures from the report include sales totaling $969 million, with a net income of $65 million and adjusted EBITDA of $134 million. The company also reported operating cash flow of $165 million.
